_publications._publicationTitle: Applying microsatellite multiplex PCR analysis (MMPA) for determining allele copy-number status and percentage of normal cells within tumors.

_contextSnippet: using a criterion that allows the discrepancy of 1 AI-microsatellite, for neurofibromas with at least 3 informative AI-microsatellites (27/29) the MMPA analysis correctly determined the AI-mechanism in all of them
details: For neurofibromas with at least 3 informative AI-microsatellites (27/29), correctly determined AI-mechanism in all of them using criterion allowing discrepancy of 1 AI-microsatellite
